name: dotenc
description: 🔐 Git-native encrypted environments powered by your SSH keys
author: Ivan Filho <i@ivanfilho.com>

scripts.typecheck: (cd cli && bun run typecheck) && (cd vscode-extension && bun run typecheck) && bun run actions:typecheck-diff
scripts.packages:typecheck-publisher: bunx tsc --noEmit --target es2022 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --types bun --skipLibCheck scripts/publish-linux-packages.ts scripts/tests/publish-linux-packages.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: (cd cli && bun run test:coverage) && (cd vscode-extension && bun run test:coverage) && bun run coverage:summary
scripts.test:coverage:full: bun run test:coverage && (cd cli && bun run test:e2e:coverage) && bun run coverage:summary:full
